SessionStart.command: echo '--- ai-meta memory status ---' && echo 'Inbox entries:' && find memory/inbox -name '*.md' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo 'Latest compaction:' && ls -t memory/compactions/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo 'none' && echo 'Submodule state:' && git submodule status --recursive 2>/dev/null | head -5

Stop.prompt: If meaningful work was done in this session (code changes, decisions, investigations), remind the user to run: ./scripts/memory_add.sh "<topic>" "<summary>" "<tags>"
